name: io.github.feedthrough/feedthrough
description: Debug bridge inside your web app: an agent reads the DOM, console and network. Any browser.

environmentVariables.description: Port the bridge WebSocket server listens on (defaults to 8765).
environmentVariables.name: FEEDTHROUGH_PORT

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated non-loopback host suffixes allowed to connect (defaults to .test). Setting it replaces the default, so include .test to keep it.
environmentVariables.name: FEEDTHROUGH_ALLOWED_HOST_SUFFIXES
